Latest News & Updates
2026-06-27 general
New Website Launched

A newly designed personal website is now live, with multilingual support and a cleaner layout....
2025-02-01 career
Starting Postdoc at Institut des Neurosciences Paris-Saclay

Joined Dr. Tihana Jovanic's team to study neural circuits of behavior....
2024-12-13 career
PhD Defense Completed Successfully!

Successfully defended my PhD thesis at Sorbonne Université....

Welcome to my homepage! I am Sharbatanu Chatterjee, and I go by the name Sharbat. I am a postdoctoral researcher in neuroscience in Paris, employed by the CNRS, and working in the team of Dr. Tihana Jovanic at the Institut des Neurosciences Paris-Saclay.

My research focuses on understanding how neural circuits give rise to behaviour.

I grew up in the banlieues of Calcutta, studied Computer Science at IIT Kanpur, then Neuroscience at EPFL (Lausanne, Switzerland), before completing a PhD in Physics (Neuroscience) at Sorbonne Université in Paris.

Beyond the lab, I am passionate about languages, history, science communication, and the politics of migration.
